rows.kill_switch_summary: Stops resolve through emergency → admin policy → release-channel → cohort/ring → user toggle for shell.labs.wedge_inspector_overlay.
rows.fallback_path: Inspect source fixtures and diagnostics records without opening the overlay.

rows.kill_switch_summary: Stops resolve through emergency → admin policy → release-channel → cohort/ring → user toggle for alpha.ts_js.launch_wedge.
rows.fallback_path: Continue with local editing, Git review, and static diagnostics.

rows.kill_switch_summary: Stops resolve through emergency → admin policy → release-channel → cohort/ring → user toggle for settings.sync_conflict_review.
rows.fallback_path: Keep local settings and export the conflict review packet.

rows.kill_switch_summary: Stops resolve through emergency → admin policy → release-channel → cohort/ring → user toggle for settings.effective_inspector.
rows.fallback_path: Use local CLI inspect without support-export attachment.

rows.kill_switch_summary: Stops resolve through emergency → admin policy → release-channel → cohort/ring → user toggle for settings.legacy_ai_egress_alias.
rows.fallback_path: Migrate to security.ai.egress_policy with a scope-explicit write preview.

rows.kill_switch_summary: Active stop: admin_policy_ceiling (policy:alpha.scope.managed_cloud_out_of_scope). Fallback: Continue locally or attach direct remote targets with visible boundary labels.
rows.fallback_path: Continue locally or attach direct remote targets with visible boundary labels.

rows.kill_switch_summary: Active stop: release_channel_or_rollout_override (migration:settings.global_ai_toggle.retired). Fallback: Review security.ai.egress_policy and provider-specific settings before apply.
rows.fallback_path: Review security.ai.egress_policy and provider-specific settings before apply.
